description: Product Description WHY CHOOSE OUR GREEN PVC COATED METAL STEEL WIRE ROPE KIT? 1. Aesthetic Green PVC Coating Design This core is coated in a heavy protective plastic allowing for resistance to harsh weather elements which means that you can easily use as clothesline outside without any worries, and the smooth PVC surface wipes clean within seconds. Moreover, the green coated wire rope has that high shine effect and good resistant to sunlight that won't fade from sunlight exposure while the vivid and attractive green color looks great for training grape vine, it can assimilate into the surroundings perfectly. 2. Multi-functional Wire Rope Set This turnbuckles for cables wire kit is usually used for clothes wire, garden climbing plants support wire, outdoor lights strings hanging. If used to hang Christmas or other holiday lights, the green coating looks more festive than the black or clear coating. And other usage for curtain Line, picture hanging wire or plant fence line, wire trellis kit, espalier wire for tree support, grapevine, rose plant training wire kit, outdoor wire for wisteria, ect. Overall the kit will work for what any unique application you can think of, believed it EXCEEDED all expectations! COMPLETE KIT COMES WITH LOTS OF PARTS! This bundle has everything you needed, and gifted screwdriver makes installation easier for you, which all the pieces are well constructed and nicely finished. The steel wire is PVC coated protection so it is not east to get rust, others are sturdy eye hooks, anchors, clamps, turnbuckles and more. BTW, compared with aluminum crimping loop sleeve, new version double hole wire rope clamps do not no need to compressed by vise, pliers, or with a compression tool, It is very easy to adjust the tightness of the wire rope with attached screwdriver, and it is very convenient in the later maintenance. If the parcel product is lost and broken, just send a email to hannger us, we will quickly respond and solve the problem! QUALITY MATERIALS Bright green color adds an extra dimension of color and fun to life, and attached turnbuckle or other parts are made of sturdy metal, which is a good capability of waterproof, durability and strength. Perfectly balanced without compromising product job performance. THICKNESS OF WIRE ROPE 1. The thickness of wire rope is real and standard 1/8" (3mm). Since the product is measured by hand, please allow a difference of 0.1 - 0.15mm and your actual measurement. 2. Product image is shoot by professionals with the real object, the color maybe slightly different with actual item due to the equipment, display and light. PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS PVC Coated Green Metal Steel Cable The garden wire for plants boasts a 1/8-inch diameter, consisting of a robust 1.9mm steel core enveloped in a transparent 1.1mm PVC coating. And attached turnbuckle or other parts are made of sturdy metal, which is a good capability of waterproof, durability and strength. Vibrant color adds an extra dimension of color and fun to life, making strong support for garden wire tensioner, outdoor lights strings hanging, plant fence, etc. Perfectly balanced without compromising product job performance. Color: Green Cable Length: 100ft (30m) Material: Hot-dip galvanized steel Warm Tips Keep the turnbuckle open while hanging the wire as tight as possible, and turn the turnbuckle to make it super tight. The turnbuckles are length-adjustable, providing flexibility to customize the applicable lengths as needed. This is a simple but highly funcational wire rope kit but it's not suitable for heavy-duty applications. Be sure to use the right number of clips and don't over-tighten for a safe connection. Not suitable for children under 3 years old. SUITABLE FOR INSTALLING ON VARIOUS WALLS Attached screw eye hooks and plastic anchors can be used with wood posts, brick walls, or concrete surfaces, these anchors are made of plastic, they are highly resistant to rust. When mounting on wall the plastic drywall anchors work in conjunction with screws, and prevent them from pulling out of the wall (Wooden walls do not need to put expansion tubes), keeping hang string light, photo frames, artwork safely and sturdily on walls. This flexibility allows you to install without any concerns, and the installation and removal are straightforward, and you have the freedom to choose accessories and connection methods that suit your specific requirements. KEY APPLICATIONS Climbing Plants Support Wire Worked nice for training grape vine, roses, kiwi vine, grapevine trellis, clematis, honeysuckle, and more. Used to run a wire from trellis to trellis to get some vines to grow across it, also can use for anchor and brace some trees, it can assimilate into the surroundings perfectly, and will not appear too abrupt which will affect the overall appearance. Great trellis line for climbing plants, garden wire, espalier kit. Excellent Clothesline System PVC outer design keeping fabrics slide on it with ease while easy to clean with a cloth, traditional woven plastic clothesline accumulates dirt between the fibers. And this is so much better than a cotton clothesline rope as it won't deteriorate in the sin and rain. Attached fasteners will adjust and tighten the line to prevent sagging. String Light Hanging Kit This green coating steel cable can be used to hang string lights or Christmas decorations in the party or other holidays occasion, which looks festive and cool. The sheathing prevented damage to the paint on the posts mounted on. And lots of extra length for other things you can hang, which is easy to adjust and take down.
